author: maxine--futura
content:
Plan: This is Work Package 2 (WP2) of the ecosystem coordination design (.design/ecosystem-coordination.md). Work happens in ~/code/forecast/atdata repo.

Scope:
1. Make _APPVIEW_URL in src/atdata/atmosphere/client.py configurable via ATDATA_GENERIC_APPVIEW env var (default: bsky.social). This is the Tier 1 generic AppView for unauthenticated cross-account reads.
2. Add lexicon drift-detection test: parse entry.json (and other lexicon files), extract all property names, assert each has a corresponding field in _lexicon_types.py types. Test fails if a property is missing.
3. Add test vector runner: glob test-vectors/ from synced lexicons, parametrize pytest over vector files, validate shard roundtrip against expected outputs.
4. Create .atdata-ecosystem.json declaring role=sdk, language=python, lexicon_sync method/ref, capabilities list.
5. Create .github/workflows/compat-check.yml triggered by repository_dispatch (event: lexicon-compat-check). Syncs the dispatched lexicon ref via just sync-lexicons, runs full test suite.

Acceptance criteria: AC-1, AC-3 (Python), AC-4 (Python runner), AC-5 (Python), AC-7 (Python).
Blocked by: #16 (need test vectors to exist first).
